name: Xtremepush
description: Xtremepush — customer engagement and data platform with multichannel messaging, ML-driven orchestration, and analytics.

seo.title: Xtremepush — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Xtremepush: Xtremepush — customer engagement and data platform with multichannel messaging, ML-driven orchestration, and analytics.

when_to_use: ML-driven multichannel campaign orchestration for mobile apps
Customer data platform with push, email, and in-app messaging
Personalized re-engagement across channels using behavioral data

pros: Multichannel orchestration across push, email, SMS, web
Strong iGaming and sports betting track record
CDP functionality built into the platform
cons: UI is dense and needs training
Overlap with Braze and MoEngage at similar cost
review.verdict: Solid enterprise CEP, especially for iGaming; compare carefully against Braze, CleverTap, and MoEngage.
review.best_for: iGaming and retail enterprises running ML-driven multichannel campaigns
review.not_for: SMB or product-led teams needing lightweight push
